findings.evidence: `CubeFace.lean:76` proves it exactly by `P.characteristicCubeWeight_mono k (Finset.erase_subset v S) x`; existing API is `CubeWeight.lean:233-236`, `theorem characteristicCubeWeight_mono ... (hST : S ⊆ T) ... : P.characteristicCubeWeight k x S ≤ P.characteristicCubeWeight k x T`.
findings.fix: Remove this theorem or keep it private, and use `P.characteristicCubeWeight_mono k (Finset.erase_subset v S) x` directly where the nonnegativity proof is needed.
findings.issue: `characteristicLowerFaceWeight_le` adds a public parallel API for the existing monotonicity theorem specialized to `S.erase v`.

summary: The upper-face API and exponent definitions are not directly replaced by existing declarations, but one new public lower-face lemma is just a special case of existing cube-weight monotonicity.
